dataflow.description: Criterion-driven what-if shadow study: tall buildings (footprint > 800 m²) in Boston's Back Bay are raised by a fixed multiplier; baseline and modified maps fan out directly from the autk compute chain for visual comparison.

nodes.goal: Load OSM buildings, surface, and parks for Boston's Back Bay neighborhood via the Autark spatial database.
Annotate buildings with footprint area, baselineHeight, and a 'tall' flag (area > 800 m²) marking the what-if subset.
Baseline view colored by original building height.
Recompute building heights for the 'tall' subset using a fixed multiplier (1.6×).
Visualize the modified scenario with tall buildings raised by the multiplier.

dataflow.name: Autark what-if shadow study
